name: DevBrain
description: Proactive Code Intelligence Platform with Multi-Agent RAG (re-ranked), P2P Delegation, Multimodal Analysis, Fine-Tuning, and Real-Time Code Smell Detection
note: DevBrain is 100% offline. Zero remote API calls. All inference (LLM, embeddings, vision, TTS, STT) runs locally via QVAC SDK on consumer hardware. P2P communication uses Holepunch DHT (peer-to-peer, no cloud relay). The only network activity is optional P2P between consenting local devices.

qvac_sdk_usage.inference: qvac.completion() — multi-agent LLM inference with tool calling + re-ranking
qvac_sdk_usage.rag_ingest: qvac.ragIngest() — vector store for codebase chunks with overlap
qvac_sdk_usage.rag_search: qvac.ragSearch() — semantic code retrieval (12 candidates, LLM re-ranked to 5)
qvac_sdk_usage.multimodal: qvac.completion() with image content — screenshot/diagram analysis via Qwen3-VL
qvac_sdk_usage.p2p_provider: qvac.startQVACProvider() — serve inference to remote peers via Holepunch DHT
qvac_sdk_usage.p2p_client: qvac.connectToQVACProvider() — delegate queries to a more powerful device
qvac_sdk_usage.fine_tuning: qvac.finetune() — LoRA adapter training on codebase via QVAC Fabric

models_used: Qwen3 4B Instruct Q4_K_M (primary LLM — routing, analysis, re-ranking, smell detection)
